failure_reason: Moved the BML/Hati native compiler floor from one-argument known calls to a two-argument packed call path. BML source now parses int Sum(int a, int b) plus return Sum(19, 23), binds both method parameters in BMA, records Hati method arity, lowers multi-arg method calls through fk-icall with packed args, loads params through __hati_arg_at/fk-nth, and rejects arity mismatch as call/arity before table emission. Focused multi-arg proof returns 20, prior method proof returns 19, floor proof returns 17, compiler proof returns 39, bml-compiler-runtime returns 131012, the metal-plane audit passes Form-native CPU/GPU/ML and macOS/Android target receipts, and full Form validation returns fourth arm: 134 band(s) four-way with 556 ok and 0 divergent. The new multi-arg proof is currently classified bml-io by the fourth-arm survey, so this commit does not claim new fourth-arm manifest admission for that band.
